pageContext.name: Dino, Pebbles and Bamm-Bamm
pageContext.description: Sideshow and Iron Studios present the latest from the Art Scale 1:10 line - Dino, Pebbles and Bamm-Bamm! Based on original references from The Flintstones, this polystone statue is hand-painted and limited edition.   Flintstones fans, don't miss your chance to add Dino, Pebbles, and Bamm-Bamm to your Flintstones collection!
